generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T ARISTOLOCHIA COLOMBIANA. So called by Higgins in his "Ophidians," is an unknown plant ; it is not possible to identify it; hence the symptoms given by Dr. Higgins have no place in this work. The same remark applies to "a proving" of Ampelopsis trifoliata , published recently in the Investigator . Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main
